full_text:
Zheng Yi (Yi’en) 鄭益 (益恩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Yi (鄭益), styledYi’en (益恩), was born in Gaomi county, Beihai commandery. Son of Zheng Xuan. Died fighting for Kong Rong either against the Yellow Turbans or Yuan Tan. Zheng Yi was affiliated with Kong Rong. Zheng Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
